title: How the Model 'Reads' the Prompt
concept: As denoising progresses, different image regions attend to different prompt words, gradually assembling a scene matching the full description.

exercises.prompt: When you read the sentence 'A red cat sits on a blue chair,' what do you do?

options.text: Picture each part of the scene as you read the words
Ignore the words and imagine something random
Only picture the last word you read

exercises.explain: Just like you build a mental picture piece by piece from words, an AI image model builds its picture piece by piece too, matching different parts of the image to different words!

cards.title: How Does AI 'Read' Your Words?
cards.body: When you type 'a red cat on a blue chair,' the AI doesn't just glance at the whole sentence once and draw. Instead, as it slowly builds the image step by step, it keeps checking back with different words — 'red' for the fur, 'blue' for the chair, 'cat' for the shape. It's like the AI is reading your prompt over and over, focusing on a different word each time!

cards.title: Attention to Prompt Words
cards.body: As the denoising process moves forward, different parts of the image pay attention to different words in the prompt. Early steps might focus on big shapes and layout, while later steps focus on small details like colors and textures — all guided by matching image regions to specific words.

cards.title: Like a Painter with a Checklist
cards.body: Imagine a painter given a list: 'red cat, blue chair, sunny window.' They don't paint everything at once. They glance at the list, block in the chair shape, glance again, add the cat, glance again, add red fur, glance again, paint the window light. The AI does the same — checking different words at different moments as the picture forms.

cards.title: Watching It Happen
cards.body: Prompt: 'a small dog wearing a yellow hat.' Early in denoising, blurry blobs form roughly where the dog and hat will be — the model is focusing on 'dog' and 'hat' for placement. In later steps, the blobs sharpen and turn yellow — now the model is paying attention to 'yellow' and 'small' to fine-tune color and size.

cards.title: Myth: The AI Reads the Prompt Only Once
cards.body: It's tempting to think the model reads your prompt one time at the start and then just paints from memory. Actually, it revisits the prompt at every single step of the denoising process, letting different words guide different regions and stages of the image as it slowly comes into focus.

cards.title: One Glance vs. Many Glances
cards.body: Compare a model that reads the prompt once versus one that keeps checking in with it throughout the whole drawing process.

left.text: Reads prompt once, then draws blindly — details often get mixed up or forgotten.

right.text: Rechecks prompt at every denoising step — details like color and shape line up with the right words.

exercises.prompt: What happens as denoising progresses in an AI image model?

options.text: Different image regions attend to different prompt words to build the full scene
The model stops reading the prompt after the first step
The image is finished instantly with no steps
The prompt words are deleted one by one

exercises.explain: Correct! The model keeps checking back with the prompt, letting different words guide different parts of the image as it comes together.

exercises.prompt: True or False: The AI model reads the prompt only one time at the very beginning and never looks at it again.
exercises.explain: False! The model revisits the prompt words throughout the whole denoising process, not just once.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the idea.
exercises.sentence: As denoising continues, different parts of the image ______ to different words in the prompt.
exercises.explain: 'Attend' means to pay attention. Different image regions pay attention to different prompt words to build the full scene correctly.

exercises.prompt: Which of these best shows the model 'reading' the prompt across steps?

options.text: Early steps shape the dog and hat's placement, later steps add the yellow color and small size details
The whole image appears instantly with no steps at all
The model paints only the background and ignores the prompt entirely

exercises.explain: Right! Early steps handle layout and shapes, while later steps refine colors and small details — all guided by different prompt words at different times.

exercises.prompt: Big picture check: Why does an AI image model keep 'reading' the prompt at every step of denoising instead of just once?

options.text: So different parts of the image can match different words, gradually building a scene that fits the whole description
Because it forgets the prompt instantly and needs constant reminders for no reason
Because reading the prompt once would make the image too colorful
Because the prompt changes on its own during generation

exercises.explain: Exactly! Continuously checking the prompt lets different image regions and denoising stages focus on different words — shapes early, details later — so the final picture matches the whole description.
